Issue: GPU memory limitations when changing patch resolution from 16×16×16 to 32×32×32
Decision: Modify model architecture by changing patch size and adding nn.Upsample block
Rationale: To accommodate larger patch size (32×32×32) due to GPU memory constraints, requiring architectural modifications like adding upsampling blocks
Author: riku-ops
Risk: Potential need for architectural modifications (e.g., adding upsampling blocks) when increasing patch size

Argument.author: id-b3
Argument.argument: The patch size for the UNETR is hard-coded to 16 due to the need for modifying the upsampling blocks if the patch size is different. This has been covered in a previous discussion.
